title: selaginella neblinae
intro: Selaginella neblinae, also known as the 'Cloud Fern', is a species of spore-producing plant in the genus Selaginella. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella neblinae have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and it is also believed to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
